sent_simp: 他十八岁就参军了，在部队待了五年。
sent_trad: 他十八歲就參軍了，在部隊待了五年。
pinyin: Tā shíbā suì jiù cān jūn le, zài bùduì dāi le wǔ nián.
english: He joined the army at eighteen and spent five years in the military.

sent_simp: 我们公司今年第一次参展，带来了几款新产品。
sent_trad: 我們公司今年第一次參展，帶來了幾款新產品。
pinyin: Wǒmen gōngsī jīnnián dì yī cì cān zhǎn, dài lái le jǐ kuǎn xīn chǎnpǐn.
english: Our company is exhibiting for the first time this year, bringing several new products.

sent_simp: 请参照说明书安装这台洗衣机。
sent_trad: 請參照說明書安裝這台洗衣機。
pinyin: Qǐng cān zhào shuōmíng shū ānzhuāng zhè tái xǐyījī.
english: Please refer to the instruction manual to install this washing machine.

sent_simp: 详细规定参见第三章第五条。
sent_trad: 詳細規定參見第三章第五條。
pinyin: Xiángxì guīdìng cān jiàn dì sān zhāng dì wǔ tiáo.
english: For detailed rules, see Chapter 3, Article 5.

sent_simp: 感冒了要及早去看医生，别拖着。
sent_trad: 感冒了要及早去看醫生，別拖著。
pinyin: Gǎnmào le yào jí zǎo qù kàn yīshēng, bié tuō zhe.
english: If you have a cold, see a doctor as soon as possible — don't put it off.

sent_simp: 新来的邻居对大家都很友善。
sent_trad: 新來的鄰居對大家都很友善。
pinyin: Xīn lái de línjū duì dàjiā dōu hěn yǒu shàn.
english: The new neighbor is very friendly to everyone.

sent_simp: 这条路改成双向通行以后，堵车少多了。
sent_trad: 這條路改成雙向通行以後，堵車少多了。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo lù gǎi chéng shuāng xiàng tōngxíng yǐhòu, dǔchē shǎo duō le.
english: Since this road was changed to two-way traffic, congestion has decreased a lot.

sent_simp: 两国签署了一项双边贸易协议。
sent_trad: 兩國簽署了一項雙邊貿易協議。
pinyin: Liǎng guó qiānshǔ le yī xiàng shuāng biān màoyì xiéyì.
english: The two countries signed a bilateral trade agreement.

sent_simp: 这首歌发布后反响很好，播放量很高。
sent_trad: 這首歌發布後反響很好，播放量很高。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu gē fābù hòu fǎn xiǎng hěn hǎo, bōfàng liàng hěn gāo.
english: The song received a great response after its release and has very high play counts.

sent_simp: 他平时话不多，上台演讲却很流利，反差挺大的。
sent_trad: 他平時話不多，上台演講卻很流利，反差挺大的。
pinyin: Tā píngshí huà bù duō, shàngtái yǎnjiǎng què hěn liúlì, fǎn chà tǐng dà de.
english: He's usually quiet, but he speaks very fluently on stage — quite a contrast.

sent_simp: 最近天气很反常，都六月了还这么冷。
sent_trad: 最近天氣很反常，都六月了還這麼冷。
pinyin: Zuìjìn tiānqì hěn fǎn cháng, dōu liù yuè le hái zhème lěng.
english: The weather has been really unusual lately — it's already June and still this cold.

sent_simp: 任何事情都有正面和反面，要全面看。
sent_trad: 任何事情都有正面和反面，要全面看。
pinyin: Rènhé shìqing dōu yǒu zhèngmiàn hé fǎn miàn, yào quánmiàn kàn.
english: Everything has a positive side and a negative side — you need to look at both.

sent_simp: 老师让我们填一份问卷，反馈课程的意见。
sent_trad: 老師讓我們填一份問卷，反饋課程的意見。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen tián yī fèn wènjuàn, fǎn kuì kèchéng de yìjiàn.
english: The teacher asked us to fill out a questionnaire to give feedback on the course.

sent_simp: 我们要发扬团队合作精神，一起把项目做好。
sent_trad: 我們要發揚團隊合作精神，一起把項目做好。
pinyin: Wǒmen yào fā yáng tuánduì hézuò jīngshén, yīqǐ bǎ xiàngmù zuò hǎo.
english: We need to carry forward the spirit of teamwork and get this project done well together.

sent_simp: 冬天他们一家人围着炉子取暖，聊天说话。
sent_trad: 冬天他們一家人圍著爐子取暖，聊天說話。
pinyin: Dōngtiān tāmen yījiā rén wéi zhe lúzi qǔ nuǎn, liáotiān shuōhuà.
english: In winter the whole family gathered around the stove to warm themselves and chat.

sent_simp: 我去ATM取款，发现卡里的钱不够了。
sent_trad: 我去ATM取款，發現卡裡的錢不夠了。
pinyin: Wǒ qù ATM qǔ kuǎn, fāxiàn kǎ lǐ de qián bùgòu le.
english: I went to the ATM to withdraw money and found there wasn't enough in my account.

sent_simp: 参加了这次培训，我受益很多。
sent_trad: 參加了這次培訓，我受益很多。
pinyin: Cānjiā le zhè cì péixùn, wǒ shòu yì hěn duō.
english: I benefited a great deal from attending this training session.

sent_simp: 她网上买东西受骗了，钱付了却没收到货。
sent_trad: 她網上買東西受騙了，錢付了卻沒收到貨。
pinyin: Tā wǎngshàng mǎi dōngxi shòu piàn le, qián fù le què méi shōudào huò.
english: She got scammed while shopping online — she paid but never received the goods.

sent_simp: 她经常变换发型，每次见面都不一样。
sent_trad: 她經常變換髮型，每次見面都不一樣。
pinyin: Tā jīngcháng biàn huàn fàxíng, měi cì jiànmiàn dōu bù yīyàng.
english: She constantly changes her hairstyle — every time we meet she looks different.

sent_simp: 两个部门的说法口径不一致，让人很困惑。
sent_trad: 兩個部門的說法口徑不一致，讓人很困惑。
pinyin: Liǎng ge bùmén de shuōfǎ kǒu jìng bù yīzhì, ràng rén hěn kùnhuò.
english: The two departments gave inconsistent accounts, which was very confusing.

sent_simp: 西安有很多古迹，每年吸引大批游客。
sent_trad: 西安有很多古蹟，每年吸引大批遊客。
pinyin: Xī'ān yǒu hěn duō gǔ jì, měi nián xīyǐn dà pī yóukè.
english: Xi'an has many historical sites that attract large numbers of tourists every year.

sent_simp: 考试作弊是可耻的行为，不应该这么做。
sent_trad: 考試作弊是可恥的行為，不應該這麼做。
pinyin: Kǎoshì zuòbì shì kě chǐ de xíngwéi, bù yīnggāi zhème zuò.
english: Cheating on exams is shameful behavior and should not be done.

sent_simp: 这个方案合乎实际情况，应该可以推行。
sent_trad: 這個方案合乎實際情況，應該可以推行。
pinyin: Zhège fāng'àn hé hū shíjì qíngkuàng, yīnggāi kěyǐ tuīxíng.
english: This plan conforms to the actual situation and should be feasible to implement.

sent_simp: 他们两个合伙开了一家小餐馆。
sent_trad: 他們兩個合伙開了一家小餐館。
pinyin: Tāmen liǎng ge hé huǒ kāi le yī jiā xiǎo cānguǎn.
english: The two of them partnered up to open a small restaurant.

sent_simp: 村里成立了一个农业合作社，大家一起种菜。
sent_trad: 村裡成立了一個農業合作社，大家一起種菜。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ chénglì le yī ge nóngyè hézuò shè, dàjiā yīqǐ zhòng cài.
english: The village set up an agricultural cooperative where everyone grows vegetables together.

sent_simp: 他每天晚上弹吉他，弹得越来越好了。
sent_trad: 他每天晚上彈吉他，彈得越來越好了。
pinyin: Tā měitiān wǎnshang tán jí tā, tán de yuè lái yuè hǎo le.
english: He plays guitar every evening and is getting better and better.

sent_simp: 这次运动会的吉祥物是一只可爱的熊猫。
sent_trad: 這次運動會的吉祥物是一隻可愛的熊貓。
pinyin: Zhè cì yùndònghuì de jí xiáng wù shì yī zhī kě'ài de xióngmāo.
english: The mascot for this sports meet is an adorable panda.

sent_simp: 在同类产品中，这款手机的性价比最高。
sent_trad: 在同類產品中，這款手機的性價比最高。
pinyin: Zài tóng lèi chǎnpǐn zhōng, zhè kuǎn shǒujī de xìngjiàbǐ zuì gāo.
english: Among similar products, this phone offers the best value for money.

sent_simp: 桂林的名胜很多，山水风景特别美。
sent_trad: 桂林的名勝很多，山水風景特別美。
pinyin: Guìlín de míng shèng hěn duō, shānshuǐ fēngjǐng tèbié měi.
english: Guilin has many scenic spots, and its landscapes are exceptionally beautiful.

sent_simp: 这次夏令营的名额有限，报名要趁早。
sent_trad: 這次夏令營的名額有限，報名要趁早。
pinyin: Zhè cì xiàlìngyíng de míng é yǒu xiàn, bàomíng yào chèn zǎo.
english: There are limited spots for this summer camp, so sign up early.

sent_simp: 她负责活动的后勤工作，安排住宿和餐饮。
sent_trad: 她負責活動的後勤工作，安排住宿和餐飲。
pinyin: Tā fùzé huódòng de hòu qín gōngzuò, ānpái zhùsù hé cānyǐn.
english: She is in charge of logistics for the event, arranging accommodation and meals.

sent_simp: 这部电影的后期制作花了将近一年时间。
sent_trad: 這部電影的後期製作花了將近一年時間。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng de hòu qī zhìzuò huā le jiāngjìn yī nián shíjiān.
english: Post-production on this film took nearly a year.

sent_simp: 他是郑和的后裔，家里还保存着一些史料。
sent_trad: 他是鄭和的後裔，家裡還保存著一些史料。
pinyin: Tā shì Zhèng Hé de hòu yì, jiā lǐ hái bǎocún zhe yīxiē shǐliào.
english: He is a descendant of Zheng He and his family still keeps some historical records.

sent_simp: 这款饮料的糖含量很高，少喝为妙。
sent_trad: 這款飲料的糖含量很高，少喝為妙。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn yǐnliào de táng hán liàng hěn gāo, shǎo hē wéi miào.
english: This drink has a very high sugar content, so it's better to drink it sparingly.

sent_simp: 台下的听众听得很投入，不时鼓掌叫好。
sent_trad: 台下的聽眾聽得很投入，不時鼓掌叫好。
pinyin: Táixià de tīng zhòng tīng de hěn tóurù, bùshí gǔzhǎng jiào hǎo.
english: The audience in the hall was very engaged, applauding and cheering from time to time.

sent_simp: 老师今天给我们做了听写，我错了三个字。
sent_trad: 老師今天給我們做了聽寫，我錯了三個字。
pinyin: Lǎoshī jīntiān gěi wǒmen zuò le tīng xiě, wǒ cuò le sān ge zì.
english: The teacher gave us a dictation test today and I got three characters wrong.

sent_simp: 上课要认真听讲，别总是玩手机。
sent_trad: 上課要認真聽講，別總是玩手機。
pinyin: Shàngkè yào rènzhēn tīng jiǎng, bié zǒng shì wán shǒujī.
english: You should pay attention in class and stop playing on your phone all the time.

sent_simp: 这家工厂吸纳了很多当地的就业人员。
sent_trad: 這家工廠吸納了很多當地的就業人員。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngchǎng xī nà le hěn duō dāngdì de jiùyè rényuán.
english: This factory has taken in many local workers.

sent_simp: 他总喜欢吹牛，说自己认识很多大人物。
sent_trad: 他總喜歡吹牛，說自己認識很多大人物。
pinyin: Tā zǒng xǐhuan chuī niú, shuō zìjǐ rènshi hěn duō dà rénwù.
english: He always loves to boast, claiming he knows all kinds of important people.

sent_simp: 这首老歌唤起了他许多童年的回忆。
sent_trad: 這首老歌喚起了他許多童年的回憶。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu lǎo gē huàn qǐ le tā xǔduō tóngnián de huíyì.
english: This old song evoked many childhood memories for him.
